micah_asset_package.typography_suggestions: Block sans-serif or slab serif, no hairline strokes, all text large enough to survive embroidery on a hat front.

amanda_listing_package.description:
Custom Embroidered Hat - Seasonal Approval Asset Package Personalized Church Team Business Cap

Create a meaningful made-to-order gift with a polished RAMFAM Kingdom/SIS Custom Creations production standard.

Why shoppers will like it:
- Built around the proven Hunter opportunity: America 250 custom embroidered hats.
- Design direction from Micah: A durable embroidered hat or workwear patch design for teams, volunteers, and entrepreneurs who want a faith-rooted identity piece. Hunter offer context: Create patch/embroidered patriotic hats for commemorative local events.
- Visual execution notes: Simple patch-ready shield or rectangle mark with bold icon, limited thread colors, and clear silhouette for embroidery digitizing.
- Personalization-friendly so buyers can request names, dates, church/team names, or short approved wording where the product allows.

Ordering notes:
1. Choose the product option and quantity.
2. Add personalization details exactly as they should appear.
3. Amanda/Manny review final wording, pricing, and production limits before public launch or customer commitment.

Offer context: Create patch/embroidered patriotic hats for commemorative local events.

Compliance note: Final art must avoid copyrighted characters, protected brand marks, celebrity names, unlicensed lyrics, and trademarked slogans.
materials: structured trucker hat or dad hat blank
amanda_listing_package.occasion: Team event, church group order, business launch, Father's Day, volunteer appreciation
amanda_listing_package.recipient: Church teams, dads, coaches, business owners, ministry volunteers
amanda_listing_package.category_recommendation: Clothing > Unisex Adult Clothing > Hats & Caps > Baseball & Trucker Caps

pricing_suggestion.rationale: Price inside or slightly above Hunter's sampled market range, then adjust after Manny reviews blank cost, labor, Etsy fees, shipping, personalization complexity, and desired margin.

production_notes: Confirm blank/product cost, supplier availability, labor time, packaging, shipping class, and Etsy fees before publishing.
Create final production art from owned or properly licensed fonts and graphics only.
Run a small sample or internal proof before accepting custom orders at scale.
Check transfer size, shirt color contrast, wash-care language, and size chart accuracy.
Digitize embroidery/patch artwork and verify stitch count, minimum text height, and thread color limits.
mockup_notes: Use mockups that clearly show the product category: Clothing > Unisex Adult Clothing > Hats & Caps > Baseball & Trucker Caps.
Reflect Micah art direction: Simple patch-ready shield or rectangle mark with bold icon, limited thread colors, and clear silhouette for embroidery digitizing.
Include at least one hero image, one close-up/detail image, one personalization example, and one scale/context image.
Keep mockup styling aligned with this color palette: khaki, deep navy, white, rust, forest green.
Do not publish mockups until Manny approves final wording, price, and production feasibility.
amanda_listing_package.manny_approval_requirement: Manny approval is required before publishing this listing, changing live pricing, spending ad budget, contacting customers, accepting custom orders, or making any public/reputation-impacting marketplace action.

approval_gate: Manny approval required before publishing, customer contact, ad spend, live product creation, or public marketplace action.
